title: After the Takarazuka Kinen: Watch Out World!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Wow, what a great race! McQueen ran so well.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
And how about Matikanetannhauser? I feel like
she's got, like... a whole different energy about
her than in her classic year.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
...As always, she's got her eye on the prize and is
still getting better.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: I have to do my best too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'm baaack!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Thank you! But I still think I've got a long
way to go.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's still so much I can do to improve. I need
to start training for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So... about my next race... I wanna run in the
Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There aren't many races in Japan where you can
face Umamusume from all around the world! Talk
about a supercharged race!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
O-obviously, I'm not confident I can win or
anything, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Still, I wanna give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, I immediately agree to set our
sights on the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Tannhauser! Thank you for giving me such a good
race today.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey McQueen! You were so cool out there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We both ran in the spring Tenno Sho, but you
have improved so much since then.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really?! You think so?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Yes. We haven't raced together very often, but I
can tell.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You are many times better than what I've seen of
you at the academy and in other races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That was... painfully evident in today's race.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Really? Ehehe. Thank you for saying so.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I can tell how hard you've been working too, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Watching you run and seeing how much you shine
gave me the courage I needed to win today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Is that right? Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
We may find ourselves competing again sometime
in the future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I look forward to when that day comes.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Same here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal race is the Japan Cup. We need to
keep pushing forward and get even better!
